---
title: "Teaching activities"
---

---

## Course materials repository

Work in progress... At the moment, all my current materials can be found on moodle.

---

## Teaching activities at Université Paris Cité

### Machine Learning I – Data Analysis  
**M1 – Master Ingénierie, Mathématique et Biostatistique (Université Paris Cité)**  
2024–2026 · Lectures, tutorials and practical sessions

Introduction to machine learning methods for high-dimensional data analysis.  
Topics include supervised and unsupervised learning methods, model evaluation, and implementation using statistical software.

### Statistics for Genetics and Genomics  
**M1 – Master Ingénierie, Mathématique et Biostatistique (Université Paris Cité)**  
2024–2026 · Lectures, tutorials and practical sessions

Course introducing statistical methods for the analysis of genetic and genomic data, including association studies, population structure and statistical modelling of genomic data.

### EM Algorithm: a case study
**M1 – Master Ingénierie, Mathématique et Biostatistique (Université Paris Cité)**  
2022–2026 · Lectures, tutorials and practical sessions

Applied course on the Expectation–Maximization algorithm, focusing on mixture models, latent variable models and practical implementation in statistical software.

### Mathematics and Calculus I  
**L1 – Licence Mathématiques et Applications (Université Paris Cité)**  
2024–2026 · Tutorials

Tutorial sessions covering fundamental concepts in calculus and mathematical analysis for first-year undergraduate students.

### Mathematics Refresher Course  
**L1 – Licence Mathématiques et Applications (Université Paris Cité)**  
2024–2026 · Tutorials

Support course aimed at strengthening mathematical foundations for undergraduate students entering the mathematics programme.

---

## Previous teaching (2013–2024)

### Statistical Genetics  
**M2 – Masters MSR and SDS (Université Paris-Saclay)**  
2020–2024 · Lectures

### Statistics for Immunology  
**M2 – Master Biologie Santé (Université Paris-Saclay)**  
2023–2024 · Lectures

### Multivariate Data Analysis  
**M1 – Masters MIBD and MSID (Université de Pau et des Pays de l’Adour)**  
2021–2023 · Lectures and practical sessions

### Introduction to Machine Learning  
**M1 – Masters MIBD and MSID (Université de Pau et des Pays de l’Adour)**  
2020–2022 · Lectures and practical sessions

### Statistics and Classification (e-learning)  
**M2 – Master Research and Innovation in Healthcare (RIS), Université Paris 13**  
2019 · Online teaching

### Probability and Statistics  
**L1–L2 – Life Sciences programmes, Université Paris Diderot**  
2013–2016 · Tutorials

### Statistics with R  
**L3 – Life Sciences programmes, Université Paris Diderot**  
2013–2016 · Tutorials and practical sessions

### Python Programming  
**L2 / M1 – Life Sciences programmes, Université Paris Diderot**  
2013–2016 · Lectures and practical sessions
